## Poem submission

**Title:**
**Author credit:** (name / handle / anonymous)
**Language:**

### Checklist
- [ ] File is in poems/ folder
- [ ] Filename is lowercase with hyphens
- [ ] Front matter opens and closes with ---
- [ ] title field is present
- [ ] Poem body is not empty
- [ ] Content note added if needed
